name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
description: NES action-platformer where the Turtles rescue April and Splinter from the Foot Clan.
aliases: The Legend of the Fierce Turtle Ninja

backlog.reason: Historically important TMNT game, but mostly worth playing as a curiosity.

access.notes: Included in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

acquisition.notes: Owned digitally through Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection.

notes: NES original; not the same game as the arcade beat 'em up.
